common.connect_wallet_to_move: Connect wallet to make on-chain moves

rps.title: Rock Paper Scissors
rps.description: Best of 5 RPS.  Channel your rage, find tranquility, or use trickery to outwit your opponent.

chess.title: Idiot Chess
chess.description: 5x5 chess with pawns who forgot how they move.  Capture all your opponent's Kings to defeat them!

banyan.title: Great Banyan
banyan.description: It take a villiage to raise a banyan tree.  Nuture its branches to find the fruit of our labor.  All nurturers get a bite of the fruit.

on_chain.title: Fully On-Chain
on_chain.description: All game logic and state is on-chain.  Secrets (like your RPS moves) are stored as a hash and revealed by proving the hash later.  Don't delete your cookies mid-game, they're holding onto your moves and salt

trustlessness.title: Trustlessness
trustlessness.description: Skrim will quickly hit rate limits for public RPCs.  If you want pure trustlessness, you can use a custom RPC url in the settings.  "Trustful Mode" is enabled by default, which fetches on-chain data through Skrim's API.  You can trust me, but if you don't want to, you can just turn off trustful mode!

payouts.title: Community is an Activity
payouts.description: As the tendrils of the banyan intertwine to support one another, so shall the scrimmages of individual conflict support each of us in turn. One percent of each 1v1 prize pool is given as tribute to The Great Banyan.  Those who nurture the banyan may be lucky enough to find its fruit.

banner.title: Under Construction
banner.message: Throwdown is currently in active development. Games are only available on Solana Devnet for now.

about.title: About Skrim
about.subtitle: Pushing the boundaries of decentralized gaming on Solana.

why_blockchain.title: Why Blockchain?
why_blockchain.content: I don't want to know your email. Compliance is a chore, any data about you I collect I have to secure and manage.  I'd rather just know you by your key and let Solana handle authentication.

fairness.title: Provable Fairness
fairness.description: Everything is public on-chain, no need to trust me.

tokens.title: No Predatory Tokens
tokens.description: No token, no aridrop, no BS. Just use $SOL.

developer.title: About the Developer
developer.bio:
I've been engineering at early-stage SaaS startups for ~5 years, before that I was at larger companies like Google and US DoD.

I've been partcipating in Crypto stuff since I found Solana in 2020. Despite the prevelance of bologna in the crypto world, the core tech (see above about not wanting your email) is pretty cool.
skills_list: Can solve a Rubik's cube in ~5 minutes

phases.title: Phase 1: Foundation (Current)
phases.description: Core lobby system, RPS with commit-reveal, and the release of Idiot Chess 5x5.

phases.title: Phase 2: Growth & Social
phases.description: In-game chat, player profiles, global leaderboards.

phases.title: Phase 3: Ecosystem Expansion
phases.description: Mobile PWA optimization, and SDK for community-built games.

about.footer: Made with ❤️ for the Solana Community.

lobby.title: Rock Paper Scissors
lobby.subtitle: Join the queue and battle for SOL prizes
lobby.no_challenges: No open challenges found. Create one to start playing!

create_modal.title: Create Challenge
create_modal.select_moves: Select your 5 moves for the challenge:

game.load_failed: Failed to load game data. Please try again.
game.no_moves_to_reveal: No moves to reveal - please submit moves first
game.security_note: All moves are committed on-chain and only revealed simultaneously to ensure complete fairness.
game.hidden_note: Your moves will be hidden until the reveal phase.
game.moves_not_found_desc: It looks like the moves you committed for this challenge are not in your browser's local storage. This can happen if you cleared your cache, are on a different device, or used a different browser.
game.moves_not_found_note: Without the original salt and moves, you won't be able to reveal.
game.reveal_desc: Time to reveal the moves you submitted.
game.reveal_wait_desc: Your opponent must commit their moves before you can reveal.
game.waiting_opponent_submit: Waiting for opponent to submit their moves...
game.waiting_matchup_resolve: Waiting for your matchup to be resolved...

deadline.stalled_note: The opponent (or both of you) missed the 90s deadline. You can now claim the prize by forfeit or request a refund of your buy-in.

strategy_descriptions.fury_desc: Fury captures the momentum of combat. It chooses the move that would have defeated your opponent's move from the previous round.
strategy_descriptions.serenity_desc: Serenity reflects a calm, unwavering spirit. It repeats the same move you performed in the previous round.
strategy_descriptions.trickery_desc: Trickery is the art of deception. It chooses the move that would have lost to your opponent's move from the previous round, luring them into a false sense of security.

toasts.no_moves_reveal: No moves to reveal - please submit moves first
toasts.revealed_auto: Moves revealed! Matchup will be resolved automatically.
toasts.reveal_failed: Failed to reveal moves - please try again
toasts.claimed_congrats: Congratulations! Prize transferred to your wallet!

lobby.title: Idiot Chess
lobby.subtitle: 5x5 Chess on Solana. Fast, brutal, on-chain.

how_to_play.rule2: Pawns can move straight forward or
how_to_play.rule5: If your king is your last piece,
how_to_play.rule7: Capture all enemy Kings to win!
